title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 486.1105 - Controlling law
text:
486.1105.  Controlling law. — Sections 486.1100 to 486.1205 supplement the provisions of sections 486.600 to 486.820 and sections 486.900 to 486.1010 for remote online notarial acts.  To the extent sections 486.600 to 486.820 and 486.900 to 486.1010 are inconsistent with sections 486.1100 to 486.1205, the provisions of 486.1100 to 486.1205 control regarding remote online notarial acts.
(L. 2020 H.B. 1655)
